summary:
Fixed.

The getter that is generated for `Ref` (nested-struct) fields now correctly returns a reference (`&T`) instead of an owned value (`T`).  
Update made in src/codegen.rs:

from  
    pub fn field(&self) -> T { &self.field }

to  
    pub fn field(&self) -> &T { &self.field }

All tests in `test.sh` now pass:

=== Code Generation Engine Tests ===  
--- Building --- …  
--- Simple accessor test --- PASS  
--- Complex nested accessor test --- PASS  
--- Generated code inspection --- PASS

The “needle” is found and removed – code generation is now type-correct for nested accessors.
